kingMouse.greeting: Welcome back! Let's keep your pharmacy running at full capacity. Ready to check today's prescription queue or review inventory alerts?
kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI practice manager for a pharmacy. You help manage prescription fulfillment, refill tracking, inventory management, immunization scheduling, and pharmacy growth. You understand pharmacy terminology including prescriptions, compounding, formularies, prior authorizations, and medication therapy management. You refer to people as patients and track prescriptions and appointments.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}, your neighborhood pharmacy. How may I help you today?

steps.title: Pharmacy information
steps.description: Enter your pharmacy name, address, NPI, and contact details

steps.title: Pharmacists & technicians
steps.description: Add your pharmacists, pharmacy technicians, and support staff

steps.title: Pharmacy services
steps.description: Select the services you offer including compounding and immunizations

steps.title: Insurance & PBM networks
steps.description: Add the insurance plans and PBM networks you participate in

steps.title: Pharmacy hours
steps.description: Set your operating hours and pickup windows

steps.title: Pharmacy branding
steps.description: Upload your logo and customize your patient-facing pages

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI practice manager for a pharmacy.
capabilities: Process insurance claims and prior authorizations
Monitor medication inventory and reorder points
Track prescription transfers and new patients
Send refill reminders and pickup notifications
